title: Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc: Publication and Highlights of the Feasibility Study for Bilboes Gold Project
author: Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc
description: Caledonia Mining Corporation announced a feasibility study for the Bilboes Gold Project in Zimbabwe, confirming a single-phase development with 1.749 Moz of gold reserves, expected first production in late 2028, and projected annual production of 200,000 oz in the first full year.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Positive feasibility study results, robust project economics with strong NPV, IRR, and production potential, and strategic expansion of gold production capabilities
Mentioned as the technology provider for BIOX® processing, with no specific evaluation of their performance
Mentioned in context of hedging arrangements with no explicit performance assessment

title: South Africa Loyalty Programs Market Report 2025: Pick n Pay Smart Shopper, Woolworths WRewards, and Clicks ClubCard Lead in the Supermarket and Pharmacy Sectors
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The South African loyalty market is expected to grow by 17.1% annually to reach $295.5 million in 2025, driven by the rise of instant rewards, fuel retail loyalty programs, and personalization through data analytics. Major players like Pick n Pay, Woolworths, Clicks, FNB, and Standard Bank dominate the market, making it challenging for new entrants to scale.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Pick n Pay's Smart Shopper program is a leading loyalty program in the supermarket sector in South Africa, indicating its strong market position.
Clicks ClubCard is a dominant loyalty program in the pharmacy sector in South Africa.
FNB eBucks is a leading financial loyalty program in South Africa, indicating the company's strong position in the market.
Standard Bank UCount is another major financial loyalty program in South Africa, further demonstrating the dominance of large banks in the loyalty program market.
